name: yaq-ai
description: YAQ-AI: 安全监管智能工作台

scripts.build:js: npx terser js/app.js -o dist/js/app.js --compress --mangle --comments false && npx terser js/rules.js -o dist/js/rules.js --compress --mangle --comments false && npx terser js/agent-init.js -o dist/js/agent-init.js --compress --mangle --comments false && for f in js/data.js js/state.js js/modules.js js/render/*.js; do [ -f "$f" ] || continue; d="dist/$(dirname $f)"; mkdir -p "$d"; npx terser "$f" -o "$d/$(basename $f)" --compress --mangle --comments false; done
scripts.build:css: for f in css/*.css; do npx cleancss -o "dist/$f" "$f"; done
scripts.build:html: cp index.html dist/ && cp 404.html dist/ && cp ai-vs-traditional-comparison.html dist/ && cp special-inspection-prototype.html dist/ && cp favicon.svg dist/ && cp .nojekyll dist/
